'''竏嗷-zh-m-v''' ('''karazhmevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:byname|byname]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byname|byname]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-zh-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| karazhmevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazhmevoko|thirazhmevoko]] || [[word:jirazhmevoko|jirazhmevoko]] || [[word:shirazhmevoko|shirazhmevoko]] || [[word:kirazhmevoko|kirazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurazhmevoko|thuthurazhmevoko]] || [[word:jujurazhmevoko|jujurazhmevoko]] || [[word:shushurazhmevoko|shushurazhmevoko]] || [[word:kukurazhmevoko|kukurazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurazhmevoko|thurazhmevoko]] || [[word:jurazhmevoko|jurazhmevoko]] || [[word:shurazhmevoko|shurazhmevoko]] || [[word:kurazhmevoko|kurazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurazhmevoko|thurazhmevoko]] || [[word:jurazhmevoko|jurazhmevoko]] || [[word:shurazhmevoko|shurazhmevoko]] || [[word:kurazhmevoko|kurazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therazhmevoko|therazhmevoko]] || [[word:jerazhmevoko|jerazhmevoko]] || [[word:sherazhmevoko|sherazhmevoko]] || [[word:kerazhmevoko|kerazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorazhmevoko|thothorazhmevoko]] || [[word:jojorazhmevoko|jojorazhmevoko]] || [[word:shoshorazhmevoko|shoshorazhmevoko]] || [[word:kokorazhmevoko|kokorazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhmevoko|thorazhmevoko]] || [[word:jorazhmevoko|jorazhmevoko]] || [[word:shorazhmevoko|shorazhmevoko]] || [[word:korazhmevoko|korazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhmevoko|thorazhmevoko]] || [[word:jorazhmevoko|jorazhmevoko]] || [[word:shorazhmevoko|shorazhmevoko]] || [[word:korazhmevoko|korazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦrazhmevoko|thﾃｦrazhmevoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦrazhmevoko|jﾃｦrazhmevoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦrazhmevoko|shﾃｦrazhmevoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦrazhmevoko|kﾃｦrazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharazhmevoko|thatharazhmevoko]] || [[word:jajarazhmevoko|jajarazhmevoko]] || [[word:shasharazhmevoko|shasharazhmevoko]] || [[word:kakarazhmevoko|kakarazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharazhmevoko|tharazhmevoko]] || [[word:jarazhmevoko|jarazhmevoko]] || [[word:sharazhmevoko|sharazhmevoko]] || [[word:karazhmevoko|karazhmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharazhmevoko|tharazhmevoko]] || [[word:jarazhmevoko|jarazhmevoko]] || [[word:sharazhmevoko|sharazhmevoko]] || [[word:karazhmevoko|karazhmevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
